defaults, validation"] mysql["MySQL Queries

access rules"] mddl --> meadow mddl --> mysql mddl --> pict mddl --> auth style mddl fill:#f5f5f5,stroke:#bdbdbd,color:#333 style meadow fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style mysql fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style pict fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#ab47bc,color:#333 style auth fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#42a5f5,color:#333 ","style":"notebook"}
